workshop.title: Basics
workshop.mission: Create your first FTML page and display a Hello World heading.
instructions: Start the document with the DOCTYPE declaration.
Load the Front runtime script before the body closes.
Add a body section inside it.
Inside the body, add a heading that says Hello World.
hints: Every HTML or FTML document begins with a DOCTYPE declaration.
The Front runtime is loaded using a script tag.
The body element contains everything visible on the page.
Headings are created using the h1 element.
workshop.author: Front Labs
